ground_truth.basis: Uncertainty accumulates gradually across several students

events.speaker: Mr. Chen
events.text: Solve 3x plus 5 equals 20 and explain each inverse operation.

events.speaker: Nia
events.text: I think we divide by three first maybe?

events.speaker: Ben
events.text: Is it x equals five or x equals twenty five?

events.speaker: Ravi
events.text: Would we subtract five from only one side?

events.speaker: Zoe
events.text: I am not sure which operation comes first.

events.speaker: Mr. Chen
events.text: Undo addition before multiplication and balance both sides.
